description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

description: city in Stanislaus County, California, United States
description_wiki: Turlock is a city in Stanislaus County, California, United States.

description: valley in central California, USA
description_wiki: The Central Valley is a broad, elongated, flat valley that dominates the interior of California, United States.

description: country in Oceania
description_wiki: Australia, officially the Commonwealth of Australia, is a country comprising the mainland of the Australian continent, the island of Tasmania and numerous smaller islands.

description: island in the North Atlantic Ocean
description_wiki: Ireland is an island in the North Atlantic Ocean, in Northwestern Europe.

description: country in north-west Europe, part of the United Kingdom
description_wiki: England is a country that is part of the United Kingdom.

description: metropolitan area in California, United States
description_wiki: The San Francisco Bay Area, commonly known as the Bay Area, is a region of California surrounding and including San Francisco Bay, and anchored by the cities of Oakland, San Francisco, and San Jose.

description: city in San Mateo County, California, United States
description_wiki: Redwood City is a city in San Mateo County, California, on the San Francisco Peninsula in the Bay Area of Northern California, approximately 27 miles (43 km) south of San Francisco and 24 miles (39 km) northwest of San Jose.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.

description: watercraft designed to move other watercraft
description_wiki: A tugboat or tug is a marine vessel that manoeuvres other vessels by pushing or pulling them, with direct contact or a tow line.

description: largest city in Vietnam

aliases: Military-Maritime Fleet of the Russian Federation
description: maritime warfare branch of Russia's military
description_wiki: The Russian Navy is the naval arm of the Russian Armed Forces.

description: city and special administrative region of China
description_wiki: Hong Kong is a special administrative region of China.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: archipelagic country in Southeast Asia
description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: island country in East Asia
description_wiki: Japan is an island country in East Asia.

description: capital and largest city of Japan
description_wiki: Tokyo, officially the Tokyo Metropolis, is the capital and most populous city of Japan.

description: 1963 murder in Dallas, Texas, U.S
description_wiki: John F. Kennedy, the 35th president of the United States, was assassinated while riding in a presidential motorcade through Dealey Plaza in Dallas, Texas, on Friday, November 22, 1963.

description: retailer in the United States
description_wiki: Montgomery Ward is the name of two U.S. retail corporations, one of which is defunct.

description: labor union
description_wiki: The International Longshore and Warehouse Union (ILWU) is a labor union which primarily represents dock workers on the West Coast of the United States, Hawaii, and in British Columbia, Canada; on the East Coast, the dominant union is the International Longshoremen's Association.

description: American zoologist
description_wiki: James Mark Fowler (April 9, 1930 – May 8, 2019) was an American professional zoologist and host of the acclaimed wildlife documentary television show Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom.
